seoTitle: Integrate Zoom With GoHighLevel: Setup Overview
metaDescription: Connect Zoom to GoHighLevel so booked appointments automatically generate meeting links and stay synced with your calendar.
intro: Connecting Zoom to GoHighLevel means booked appointments can automatically include a meeting link, saving you from manually creating and sending Zoom details for every call. This overview covers the general steps for linking the two platforms.

steps.heading: Connect your Zoom account
steps.body: Authorize your Zoom account within GoHighLevel's integration settings to begin the connection process.

steps.heading: Link Zoom to your booking calendar
steps.body: Configure your GoHighLevel calendar so it automatically generates a Zoom link when an appointment is booked.

steps.heading: Set meeting preferences
steps.body: Adjust settings such as meeting duration and notification preferences so they align with how you use Zoom.

steps.heading: Test a booking
steps.body: Book a test appointment to confirm the Zoom link generates correctly and appears in confirmation and reminder messages.

steps.heading: Automate reminders with meeting details
steps.body: Use workflows to send automated reminders that include the Zoom link, reducing no-shows and manual follow-up.

faq.question: Does GoHighLevel automatically create a Zoom link for each booking?
faq.answer: Once connected, the calendar can be configured to automatically generate a Zoom link for booked appointments.

faq.question: Do I need a paid Zoom account for this integration?
faq.answer: Requirements can vary, so it's worth checking your Zoom plan's meeting limits against how you plan to use the integration.

faq.question: Can reminders include the Zoom meeting link automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, automated reminders can be set up to include meeting details once the integration is configured.

faq.question: Who benefits from this integration?
faq.answer: Consultants, coaches, and service providers who conduct calls or meetings through Zoom and want a seamless booking-to-meeting process.

faq.question: What should I do if the Zoom link isn't appearing on bookings?
faq.answer: Double-check that your Zoom account is properly connected and that your calendar settings are configured to generate a link automatically.
